blended.narrative: Cascade Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 732 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: flurries, highs of 40°F, winds around 23 mph.
Sunday: 15" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
